headline: CDL’s $2.29 annual dividend beats Treasury yields despite rising interest rates
summary: Income investors holding the VictoryShares US Large Cap High Div Volatility Wtd ETF (NYSEARCA:CDL) own a fund built around one premise: large American companies with stable share prices tend to pay reliable dividends. CDL distributes cash monthly and paid $2.29 per share in 2025 against a current share price of roughly $76. With Treasury yields ... headline: EVRG: Technical Breakout Setup with Near-Perfect Ratings Points to Potential Upside for Evergy Inc (NASDAQ:EVRG)
summary: Evergy Inc (EVRG) scores 9/10 on both technical trend and setup quality, forming a textbook breakout pattern with clear support and resistance levels for a defined risk-reward trade.
